## Conversion.Converters.isValidator() function

Determines if a supplied [Converter](./ts-utils.conversion.converter.md) or [Validator](./ts-utils.validation.validator.md) is a [Validator](./ts-utils.validation.validator.md)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function isValidator<T, TC>(converterOrValidator: Converter<T, TC> | Validator<T, TC>): converterOrValidator is Validator<T, TC>;
```
